introSection: Das Große LEGO Rennen is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was originally known as Project X - Test Strecke.

In 2018, it was renamed to Das Große LEGO Rennen and a virtual reality option was offered.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a stock model from Mack Rides known as Large Park Wild Mouse.

fullText:
Das Große LEGO Rennen is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Legoland Deutschland in Günzburg, Bavaria, Germany.

The ride was originally known as Project X - Test Strecke.

In 2018, it was renamed to Das Große LEGO Rennen and a virtual reality option was offered.

The ride is a stock model from Mack Rides known as Large Park Wild Mouse.
